nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=90 beats='Tansy the young hedgehog stands in her cozy mossy stump clearing; tonight is the Woodland Lantern Festival and there is still so much to gather; she counts on her paws what she needs and decides where to set out first; warm and excited, never worried'>>

choices.label: Go pick glowberries by the bramble patch.
Go invite your friends at the willow.
Go cut reeds for lantern frames.
Go ask the bees for honey cakes.
Go fetch the old paper lanterns.
Go ask the cricket band to play.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='at the bramble patch the low berries are ripe and glowing softly, but a fatter cluster hangs high on a wobbly branch; Tansy decides whether to fill her basket with the easy low ones or stretch up for the high ones'>>

choices.label: Pick the ripe low glowberries.
Climb for the high cluster.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Tansy fills her basket with glowing berries that light her chin from below; the gathering is beginning to grow; she can carry the berries onward to the festival meadow or trot back to the clearing to fetch more things first'>>

choices.label: Carry the glowberries to the meadow.
Go back to the clearing for more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='under the old willow Tansy finds her friends dozing in the warm afternoon; she wants to invite them all to the festival; she decides whether to knock gently and wake them softly or clang the loud dinner bell to hurry things along'>>

choices.label: Knock gently on the willow door.
Clang the loud dinner bell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='her friends yawn, smile, and say yes at once, grabbing their little lanterns; the group is growing; Tansy can lead the happy troop straight to the meadow or swing back by the clearing to grab the next thing on her list'>>

choices.label: Lead your friends to the meadow.
Pop back to the clearing first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='at the reedy pond Tansy needs stalks to bend into lantern frames; the tall dry reeds rustle on the bank while fresh green ones lean out over the water; she decides which reeds to cut'>>

choices.label: Cut the tall dry reeds.
Cut the fresh green reeds.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the dry reeds snap free in a neat golden bundle, perfect for bending; Tansy can start weaving the lantern frames right here by the pond or lug the whole bundle back to the clearing to work by her stump'>>

choices.label: Weave the frames here by the pond.
Carry the bundle back to the clearing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Tansy bends the reeds into round little lantern frames, humming as she works; a stack of them balances in her arms; there is only one thing to do now, carry the finished frames to the festival meadow'>>

choices.label: Carry the lantern frames to the meadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='at the round hive Tansy asks the bees for a few honey cakes for the festival feast; the bees buzz kindly; she decides whether to wait politely for them to pack a basket or dash back to the clearing and come by for the cakes later'>>

choices.label: Wait politely for the honey cakes.
Head back to the clearing for now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the bees load a basket with warm golden honey cakes that smell of clover; the feast is coming together; Tansy thanks them and carries the sweet-smelling basket straight to the festival meadow'>>

choices.label: Carry the honey cakes to the meadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='in the little garden shed the old paper lanterns from last year sit dusty on a shelf; Tansy decides whether to dust each one off carefully now or scoot back to the clearing and fetch them on the next trip'>>

choices.label: Dust off the old paper lanterns.
Go back to the clearing for now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the paper lanterns come up bright and pretty under Tansy's little cloth, their painted moons and leaves good as new; her armful of festival treasures keeps growing; she carries the lanterns off toward the meadow'>>

choices.label: Carry the paper lanterns to the meadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='by the tall grass the cricket band tunes their tiny fiddles; Tansy asks if they will play at the festival; they chirp eagerly; she decides whether to lead them along right away or pop back to the clearing to gather one more thing first'>>

choices.label: Ask the crickets to follow you now.
Go back to the clearing first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the cricket band forms a cheerful little parade behind Tansy, fiddles under their arms; music will make the night complete; she leads the chirping players all the way to the festival meadow'>>

choices.label: Lead the cricket band to the meadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the festival meadow opens wide at dusk, ringed by the big oak and the still pond; everything Tansy has gathered is piling up and friends are arriving; she decides whether to start setting the festival up now or make one last trip back to the clearing for anything forgotten'>>

choices.label: Start setting up the festival.
Make one last trip to the clearing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='in the meadow the reed frames get wrapped in bright paper and the glowberries tucked inside to shimmer; friends bustle everywhere; Tansy decides whether to hang the lanterns up in the great oak or spread out the picnic feast first'>>

choices.label: Hang the lanterns in the great oak.
Spread out the picnic feast.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='friends lift the finished lanterns into the branches of the great oak, where they sway like sleepy fireflies; the sky is turning purple; Tansy decides whether to light them right this moment or wait for the very first star to appear'>>

choices.label: Light the lanterns right now.
Wait for the first star.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='one by one the lanterns wake up with warm glowberry light and the whole meadow glows gold; everyone gasps with delight; Tansy decides whether to set some lanterns floating out across the calm pond or keep them all glowing high in the oak'>>

choices.label: Float lanterns on the pond.
Keep the lanterns in the oak.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='everyone grows hushed and watches the darkening sky until the first tiny star blinks awake over the meadow; a happy cheer goes up; that is the signal, and Tansy lights the very first lantern to begin the festival glow'>>

choices.label: Light the first lantern and begin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='lantern after lantern flickers on until the meadow is a sea of soft golden light and the pond mirrors it all; the crickets lift their fiddles; Tansy decides whether to start a lantern song for everyone or gather her friends to make a wish together'>>

choices.label: Start a lantern song.
Make a wish together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the crickets strike up a bouncy tune and Tansy leads the first verse of the old lantern song; friends join line by line until the whole meadow is singing under the glowing oak'>>

choices.label: Sing the festival into the night.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the friends gather in a ring around the brightest lantern, close their eyes, and hold paws; Tansy counts softly to three so everyone can make the same warm wish for the woodland at once'>>

choices.label: Make the wish all together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Tansy spreads a checked cloth on the grass and lays out the honey cakes and berry treats while lanterns glow softly overhead; friends settle around; she decides whether to start sharing the honey cakes now or wait for old Granny Hedgehog to arrive and bless the feast'>>

choices.label: Start sharing the honey cakes.
Wait for Granny Hedgehog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the honey cakes go round the glowing circle and everyone munches happily under the swaying lanterns; the feast is a merry success; Tansy decides whether to let the feast roll on into the night or start a round of giggly riddles between bites'>>

choices.label: Let the happy feast roll on.
Start a round of riddles.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='between bites of honey cake the friends trade silly riddles, each one sillier than the last, until everyone is laughing so hard the lantern light seems to giggle too; Tansy saves the very best riddle for the end'>>

choices.label: Tell the very best riddle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Granny Hedgehog arrives leaning on her cane, her spines silver in the lantern light; the friends make room and grow quiet; she smiles and begins the old story of the very first woodland lantern, just as she does every year'>>

choices.label: Listen to Granny's lantern story.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=75 beats='Tansy stretches for the high cluster, the wobbly branch springs back, and her whole basket of berries bounces away into the soft ferns with a comic boing; nobody is hurt and she laughs, dusting off to trot back to the clearing and start her gathering again'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=75 beats='the loud dinner bell clangs and every sleepy friend tumbles out of the willow at once in a giggly, grumbly heap, blankets over their heads; it takes ages to sort out the muddle, so Tansy decides to start over and invite them the gentle way next time'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=75 beats='the fresh green reeds are far too soft and wet to hold a shape; every frame Tansy bends just flops over like cooked noodles and drips on her paws; she laughs at the soggy mess and heads back to the clearing to begin again with the right reeds'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Tansy and her friends set glowing lanterns adrift on the still pond, where they float like little golden moons doubled in the water; the whole meadow ohhs together; the festival is beautiful and complete, and Tansy glows as bright as her lanterns'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the great oak blazes with hanging lanterns like a tree full of warm stars, and everyone dances slowly beneath its golden branches; Tansy looks up at all she and her friends have made together, her heart as full and bright as the festival glow'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the whole meadow sings the old lantern song under the glowing oak, cricket fiddles sailing above every voice; the music rolls out over the pond and into the night; Tansy sings loudest of all, proud of the festival her gathering has grown into'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='in the ring of lantern light the friends make one warm wish together for a happy woodland year, then open their eyes to the glowing meadow all around them; Tansy squeezes her friends' paws, sure that this is the best festival there ever was'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the honey cakes and berry treats go round and round beneath the swaying lanterns while everyone laughs and nibbles late into the glowing night; the feast Tansy gathered piece by piece has brought the whole woodland together, warm and merry'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Tansy tells the very best riddle of all and the whole glowing circle roars with laughter, honey cakes nearly forgotten; the lanterns seem to twinkle along with the giggling; it is the merriest festival night the woodland friends can remember'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='Granny Hedgehog finishes the old tale of the very first woodland lantern just as every lantern in the meadow glows its brightest, and the friends clap softly; Tansy leans against Granny, happy that her gathering has kept the gentle festival alive one more year'>>
